mapper.sql: Id, remark, message, useTime, isSuccess, APIname, type, return_message, cost_time, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_coordinate
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_coordinate (Id, remark, message, useTime, isSuccess, APIname, type, return_message, cost_time, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{message,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{usetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{issuccess,jdbcType=BIT}, #{apiname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{returnMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{costTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into dbo.ops_coordinate
Id,
remark,
message,
useTime,
isSuccess,
APIname,
type,
return_message,
cost_time,
create_time,
update_time,
create_user,
update_user,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{message,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{usetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{issuccess,jdbcType=BIT},
#{apiname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{returnMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{costTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_coordinate
Id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
message = #{record.message,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
useTime = #{record.usetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
isSuccess = #{record.issuccess,jdbcType=BIT},
APIname = #{record.apiname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
type = #{record.type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
return_message = #{record.returnMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cost_time = #{record.costTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.ops_coordinate set Id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, message = #{record.message,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, useTime = #{record.usetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, isSuccess = #{record.issuccess,jdbcType=BIT}, APIname = #{record.apiname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type = #{record.type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, return_message = #{record.returnMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cost_time = #{record.costTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.ops_coordinate
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
message = #{message,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
useTime = #{usetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
isSuccess = #{issuccess,jdbcType=BIT},
APIname = #{apiname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
return_message = #{returnMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cost_time = #{costTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where Id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.ops_coordinate set remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, message = #{message,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, useTime = #{usetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, isSuccess = #{issuccess,jdbcType=BIT}, APIname = #{apiname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, return_message = #{returnMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cost_time = #{costTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where Id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
